name: Wayfarer Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve

labels: ''

---
<!-- This Format is for helping report bugs for better tracking and development, please fill out this brief questionaire to help us resolve the issue you're experiencing. The more details you can provide, the better! -->
### Issue Summary:
<!-- Describe the bug and how it's affecting gameplay. Is this a severe bug that is creating a game breaking situation? Where and when did this occur? -->
### Error Logs:
<!-- Did this bug produce any errors in the console when it occurs? Please provide if possible a screenshot of the reported errors in the console (~) -->

### Reproduction Steps:
<!-- Please describe if possible how to reproduce the bug if possible. If you are unable to properly reproduce the bug, how did you get it to occur to you the first time? Trace back your steps and try to remember what might have caused the bug. Pretend you're writing down a recipe, list all the steps and "ingredients" to re-make the bug in a nice ordered list. Please avoid using generics in descriptions, assume the reader knows nothing about what you're talking about. -->

### Why do you think this is happening?:


### Temporary Workarounds:
<!-- Is there a temporary work around, or a means of avoiding the bug in the meantime while a solution is created? -->

### Requirements
<!-- Confirm the following by placing an X in the brackets [X]: -->
- [ ] Is this a new issue? Did you search keywords relating to this issue on our discord bug and suggestion forum?
- [ ] Was there any companion or linking issues?
### Related Issues:
<!-- [Link or reference the issue here if applicable] -->

### Technical Details:
System:
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] Mac

Client
- [ ] Wizden
- [ ] Other (Please Specify)
